# Quaternary Sediment

**Summary**: Sedimentary deposits of the Quaternary period, often forming significant aquifers.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2026-fatima|Fatima, 2026]] used material from the Neogene aquifer to simulate local coastal conditions.
